text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English.
zh: 大家好，欢迎收听《Real Easy English》。

text: In this podcast, we have real conversations in Easy English to help you understand.
zh: 在这个播客节目里，我们用简单英语进行真实对话，帮助大家理解。

text: I'm Neil.
zh: 我是尼尔。

text: And I'm Beth.
zh: 我是贝丝。

text: You can watch a video of this podcast and find a worksheet to help you learn on our website
zh: 你可以在我们的网站上观看这期播客的视频，还能找到学习用的练习表。

text: bbclearningenglish .com Beth, how are you today?
zh: 网址是bbclearningenglish.com。贝丝，你今天怎么样？

text: I'm very good, Neil.
zh: 我很好，尼尔。

text: How are you?
zh: 你呢？

text: I'm very well.
zh: 我也很好。

text: What are we talking about?
zh: 我们今天聊什么？

text: Today we are talking about work and the office.
zh: 今天我们聊的是工作和办公室。

text: An office is a place with desks and computers where people do their jobs.
zh: 办公室是一个有桌子和电脑、人们在那里工作的地方。

text: OK.
zh: 好的。

text: We are in a studio in the office, but we'll go back to the office after this.
zh: 我们现在是在办公室里的一个录音室，但录完之后我们会回到办公室去。

text: Yes, we will.
zh: 是的，会的。

text: So, Neil, where do you work?
zh: 那尼尔，你平时在哪里工作？

text: Do you work at home or do you work in the office?
zh: 你是在家工作还是在办公室工作？

text: Well, I do both of those things.
zh: 嗯，两种都有。

text: I work in the office usually three days a week and I work from home two days a week.
zh: 我通常一周有三天在办公室工作，两天在家工作。

text: OK.
zh: 好的。

text: I'm the same.
zh: 我也是一样。

text: We have the same schedule.
zh: 我们的日程安排一样。

text: So, yeah, at home twice where I have a sort of place that could be considered a home office.
zh: 是的，在家工作的那两天，我有一个可以算是家庭办公室的地方。

text: Do you like working in the office?
zh: 你喜欢在办公室工作吗？

text: I do like working in the office.
zh: 我确实喜欢在办公室工作。

text: I think it's easy to get work done in the office because it's an office environment.
zh: 我觉得在办公室工作更容易完成任务，因为那是一个办公环境。

text: It's a workplace.
zh: 那是一个工作场所。

text: But I also quite like working from home sometimes because commuting, London is a big city, you know, coming to work and going back is really tiring if you do it every day.
zh: 不过我有时候也挺喜欢在家工作的，因为通勤——伦敦是个大城市，你懂的，每天来回上下班真的很累人。

text: Yeah, I know what you mean.
zh: 是的，我明白你的意思。

text: I like working from home occasionally, but I definitely prefer being in the office.
zh: 我偶尔喜欢在家工作，但我肯定更喜欢在办公室工作。

text: I think being with colleagues around you and I need people and then I can work better.
zh: 我觉得身边有同事在，我需要有人在旁边，这样我才能更好地工作。

text: Yeah.
zh: 是的。

text: So what's wrong with working from home?
zh: 那在家工作有什么不好呢？

text: Oh, a lot.
zh: 哦，问题可多了。

text: I think when you're in the office, yeah, it's louder than at home, home.
zh: 我觉得在办公室里虽然比家里吵，

text: But I like having the people around me.
zh: 但我喜欢身边有人。

text: I like being able to have conversations.
zh: 我喜欢能够和人交流。

text: I find it's easier to work in an office environment because everyone else is working.
zh: 我发现在办公环境里工作更容易，因为周围的人都在工作。

text: But I feel more lonely at home because it's just me.
zh: 但在家里我会觉得更孤单，因为只有我一个人。

text: So, yeah.
zh: 所以，是这样的。

text: I understand what you mean.
zh: 我明白你的意思。

text: I also have a bit of a problem with working from from home because
zh: 我在家工作也有点问题，那就是

text: the boundary or the line between work and home is not so clear so when you finish your day you
zh: 工作和生活之间的界限不太清楚，所以当你结束一天的工作、

text: close your computer and you think oh hang on I'm still at home this is where I've been working all day and sometimes
zh: 合上电脑的时候，你会想，等等，我还在家里啊，这就是我一整天工作的地方，

text: you feel like you should be doing things for home when you're actually working yeah it's a bit weirder like
zh: 有时候你会觉得自己该去做点家里的事，可你其实还在工作。是的，这感觉有点奇怪，

text: it's it's strange being at home because it's harder to know whether you should be working or doing a bit of housework in the office it's
zh: 在家里挺奇怪的，因为很难分清自己该工作还是该做点家务。而在办公室里

text: easier to just sit be with your laptop be with your colleagues and just be be working have you ever worked somewhere that is not an office?
zh: 就更简单，只需要坐下来，带着笔记本电脑，和同事在一起，专心工作就好了。你有没有在不是办公室的地方工作过？

text: Yes, so I used to work at a farm.
zh: 有，我以前在一个农场工作过。

text: It was a farm park, so lots of children playing and there was a cafe,
zh: 那是一个农场公园，有很多小孩在玩耍，还有一个咖啡馆，

text: there was a play area, go -karts, being with animals, so lots of different areas and it was fun, lots of variety.
zh: 有游乐区、卡丁车、还有动物，各种各样的区域，很有趣，内容很丰富。

text: So that wasn't an office.
zh: 所以那不是一个办公室。

text: What about you?
zh: 你呢？

text: I've worked in all kinds of places, offices, especially when I was a student.
zh: 我在各种各样的地方工作过，办公室也有，尤其是我还是学生的时候。

text: I worked in factories, farms, I've worked in restaurants, bars, all kinds of places that are not offices.
zh: 我在工厂、农场都工作过，也在餐厅、酒吧工作过，各种不是办公室的地方都待过。

text: You've done it all.
zh: 你什么都做过了。

text: I've done it all.
zh: 是啊，什么都做过了。

text: Let's recap some of the vocabulary we heard in this podcast.
zh: 我们来回顾一下这期播客中出现的一些词汇。

text: We had office, a place with desks and computers where people go to work.
zh: 我们讲到了office（办公室），指人们工作的地方，有桌子和电脑。

text: Sometimes at BBC Learning English we work in the office.
zh: 在BBC Learning English，我们有时也会在办公室工作。

text: We had working remotely, which we often also call working from home.
zh: 我们讲到了working remotely（远程工作），我们通常也称之为working from home（在家工作）。

text: And that means working somewhere that isn't the office, for example, your home, but it could also be a cafe or something.
zh: 意思是在办公室以外的地方工作，比如你的家，但也可能是咖啡馆之类的地方。

text: We also had colleagues.
zh: 我们还讲到了colleagues（同事）。

text: These are the people that you work with.
zh: 这是指和你一起工作的人。

text: And we compared working from home with working from an office and we used lots of comparatives.
zh: 我们还比较了在家工作和在办公室工作，用了很多比较级。

text: So, it's harder to concentrate at home or it's more difficult to get your work done in the office.
zh: 比如说，在家更难集中注意力，或者说在办公室完成工作更困难。

text: Yes, and it's louder in the office, but sometimes that's better.
zh: 是的，办公室更吵，但有时候这反而更好。

text: That's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 这就是本期《Real Easy English》的全部内容。

text: You can test what you've learnt with a worksheet which you can download for free from our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 你可以通过我们网站bbclearningenglish.com上免费下载的练习表来检验一下自己学到的内容。

text: Bye!
zh: 再见！
